title: I used to consistently lose money, but now I have turned my account around and grown it to $100,000.😋
author: Dramatic_Jackfruit57
selftext:
I used to lose money trading, and I even doubted whether I was just not suited to trading. I never imagined that one day I would gradually learn to read the market and keep pace with its rhythm.

Back then, I was a typical "blindly following novice," chasing after any upward trend, always thinking it would continue to rise, but often ending up buying at the peak and frequently incurring losses.

Later, by chance, a friend introduced me to a discussion group.

I began learning from experienced traders, slowly grasping the market's rhythm and refining my own judgment.

Gradually, I started to make stable small profits, and my account gradually improved.

Meeting a group of like-minded people to communicate and grow together is the luckiest thing in my experience, and because of this, I have avoided a lot of detours.

I am very grateful to these patient and willing friends. We exchange ideas, review our trades, and make continuous progress together in a relaxed and supportive atmosphere.

If you are also interested in trading, or would like to join our discussion group, feel free to leave a comment or send me a private message! The group is completely free, with no courses and no product sales pitches.

comments.author: Accomplished-Fan9568
comments.body: Nicely done. I would love to join this group, is it a discord?
